.github.purpose: Repository governance, automation, ownership, and contribution forms

docs.purpose: User, operator, architecture, evaluation, and repository reference

graph-ui.purpose: React and Three.js source, tests, and frontend build configuration

internal.purpose: Extraction engine, language integration, and pinned grammar sources

scripts.purpose: Build, test, security, release, and repository maintenance automation

test-infrastructure.purpose: Shared test infrastructure and external test fixtures

tests.purpose: Required C suites and open-bug reproduction cases

tools.purpose: Developer utilities and generated-source maintenance tools

srcModules.cli: Commands, installation, updates, configuration, and client integration
srcModules.cypher: Cypher parsing, planning, SQL translation, and execution
srcModules.discover: Repository discovery, ignore rules, languages, and user configuration
srcModules.foundation: Portable runtime, allocation, strings, logging, and subprocesses
srcModules.graph_buffer: In-memory graph construction before store persistence
srcModules.mcp: JSON-RPC transport, MCP sessions, schemas, and tool dispatch
srcModules.semantic: Local semantic embeddings and related-node discovery
srcModules.store: SQLite schema, persistence, search, traversal, and architecture data
srcModules.ui: Embedded HTTP server and graph UI delivery
